arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta sends Raheem Sterling a message amid Arsenal's injury crisis in attack - as Gunners boss reveals boost with star set to return after long lay-off
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN: The 30-year-old has started just four Premier League games so far this season having underwhelmed since signing on loan from Chelsea on summer transfer deadline day.

arts.ttl: Team News: Aston Villa vs. Chelsea injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Aston Villa and Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Champions League fixtures confirmed as Arsenal, Liverpool and Aston Villa learn dates
arts.sum: Arsenal, Aston Villa and Liverpool will participate in the Champions League Round of 16 next month with all three teams learning their fixture dates and kick-off times

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta fires warning to Raheem Sterling over Arsenal future
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta sends a message to Raheem Sterling over his Arsenal future.

arts.sum: A former Blue fell victim of this...

arts.ttl: Gyokeres transfer BOMBSHELL: Chelsea rekindle interest in Man Utd target
arts.sum: Chelsea have reportedly rekindled their interest in Sporting CP centre forward Viktor Gyokeres amid their search for a new striker this summer. Ipswich Town star Liam Delap is believed to be Chelsea ’s priority target following his immense start to life in the English top flight, although the Blues are also interested in signing Gyokeres, according to GiveMeSport .

arts.ttl: Chelsea lining up to snap up ‘super talent’ – Already presented ‘concept’ to entourage
arts.sum: Chelsea are chasing German U19 ‘super talent’ Kofi Jeremy Amoako from VfL Wolfsburg as they continue targeting top talent. That’s according to BILD, who report that Chelse have been watching the 19-year-old this season as he’s impressed on loan at VfL Osnabrück. He joined 3. arts.ttl: Champions League fixture dates for Arsenal, Liverpool and Aston Villa confirmed
arts.sum: The last 16 first legs will be played on 4 and 5 March, with the return legs on 11 and 12 March

arts.ttl: Chelsea news: Enzo Maresca makes HUGE summer transfer decision
arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly want to re-introduce Renato Veiga into the first-team fold following his loan spell at Juventus . Veiga was largely deployed at left-back following his arrival at Chelsea, although his preferred role is as a central defender and he has excelled in this position since joining Juventus.

arts.ttl: UECL draw: Chelsea to face Copenhagen in last 16
arts.sum: Chelsea were paired with Copenhagen in the round of 16 of the UEFA Conference League on Friday.
